narrative:
North Olmsted-01-A (precinct in Cuyahoga County) has 1,096 registered voters, with 54.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 20.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 25.5%, a modest Democratic lean of 5.4 percentage points.
